name: NexPoint Residential Trust, Inc.
summary: PART I ITEM 1. B USINESS General NexPoint Residential Trust, Inc. (the Company, we, our) was incorporated in Maryland on September 19, 2014, and has elected to be taxed as a REIT. The Company is focused on value-add multifamily investments primarily located in the Southeastern and Southwestern United States.
